title: Meta-Fiction
description: Pieces with characters who operate above and beyond the fourth wall

title: Sci-Fi
description: Pieces that involve futuristic concepts, advanced technologies, and scientific breakthroughs

title: Fantasy
description: Narratives fundamentally structured around physically impossible mechanics, magic systems, or mythological worldbuilding

title: Horror
description: Pieces exploring various forms of dread, terror, fear, and tension.

title: Satire
description: Pieces that use humorous observation and outright jokes to provide commentary and critique of systems, society, and more

title: Philosophical Fiction
description: Narratives explicitly engineered as Trojan Horses to explore, prosecute, or debate a theoretical or systemic thesis

title: Extrapolative Fiction
description: Narratives that isolate an existing contemporary variable (technological or sociological) and project it vigorously into a hypothetical timeline to observe the consequences

title: Memoir
description: Autobiographical narratives explicitly recounting the author's literal historical timeline

title: AutoFiction
description: Autobiographical narratives that have been highly stylised or modified to present a fictitious or synthesized account of the author's real life
